description: This file defines two mixins for visually hiding content and making it focusable only when focused, used for accessibility purposes in CSS styling.

methods.name: visually-hidden
methods.description: A mixin that visually hides content while keeping it accessible to assistive technologies.

methods.name: visually-hidden-focusable
methods.description: A mixin that makes content visible only when it is focused or when a child element is focused, enhancing accessibility.
